title: An entitled mom cut a hole in my bounce house's safety net with kitchen scissors
script: I run a bounce house rental company, and last Saturday a mom named Denise paid for fifteen kids at her son's sixth birthday, but forty showed up. I told her our safety limit was fifteen per hour because our insurance requires it, no exceptions. She screamed that I was ruining her son's memories and stormed toward her truck. Ten minutes later I heard fabric ripping. Denise was on her knees behind the bounce house, cutting a hole through the safety netting with kitchen scissors so the extra kids could climb in from the side while she smiled at me. I filmed the whole thing and sent it straight to my insurance agent. The next morning he called back pale, reading me two open claims from other rental companies in our county, same woman, same scissors, same torn netting, and two kids already sent to the ER before mine.
